positive: Minimalist, abstract geometric silhouette of a soaring mountain range merging with a crescent moon and scattered constellations. Style: Neo-tribal, modern zen art, line art mixed with solid negative space. Composition: Central, balanced, vertically oriented. Lighting: High contrast, deep midnight blue and indigo palette with sharp, glowing gold and silver accents. Color Direction: Limited color palette focused on two-tone (white/cream on deep navy/teal background). Print-friendly details: Optimized for apparel print, designed with clean, crisp lines and solid, scalable shapes, suitable for single-color screen printing. Style inspiration: Japanese Ukiyo-e meets modern geometric abstraction.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, noisy, poor anatomy, extra limbs, deformed, low resolution, jpeg artifacts, busy background, photorealism, sketch, gradient, halftone, logo, trademark, copyright
